title: My Journey at 1337 Coding School
excerpt: From day one at 1337 (42 Network) to mastering C systems programming — here's what peer-to-peer learning really looks like and how it shaped me as a developer.

title: Why I Love C Programming
excerpt: C is often called outdated, but for me it's the ultimate teacher. Here's why writing code close to the metal makes you a better programmer in any language.
